item.description: President Trump held a news conference capping off the latest NATO summit in Turkey and faced questions from reporters about the ongoing conflict with Iran. NBC News' Garrett Haake and Courtney Kube report on the latest developments in negotiations and strikes in the Middle East.

media:content.media:title: Trump faces questions on conflict with Iran during NATO summit press conference
media:content.media:description: President Trump held a news conference capping off the latest NATO summit in Turkey and faced questions from reporters about the ongoing conflict with Iran. NBC News' Garrett Haake and Courtney Kube report on the latest developments in negotiations and strikes in the Middle East.

item.title: Trump faces questions on conflict with Iran during NATO summit press conference

item.description: During the NATO summit in Turkey, President Trump held a bilateral meeting with Ukrainian President Zelenskyy as he discussed efforts to end the conflict with Russia.

media:content.media:title: Trump holds bilateral meeting with Zelenskyy at NATO summit
media:content.media:description: During the NATO summit in Turkey, President Trump held a bilateral meeting with Ukrainian President Zelenskyy as he discussed efforts to end the conflict with Russia.

item.title: Trump holds bilateral meeting with Zelenskyy at NATO summit

item.dc:creator: Scott Wong
Ryan Nobles
item.description: Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear is asking Mitch McConnell for an update on his health and whether he believes he can continue to serve in the role.

media:content.media:text: Sen. Mitch McConnell, R-Ky., at the Capitol on March 24, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Sen. Mitch McConnell, R-Ky., at the Capitol on March 24, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear speaks in Detroit on April 18, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear speaks in Detroit in April.

item.title: Kentucky governor urges McConnell to be ‘transparent’ and give an update on his health

item.description: Maine’s Democratic senate nominee Graham Platner is facing mounting pressure from top Democrats to end his campaign, including from Elizabeth Warren and Bernie Sanders who have released statements calling for him to step aside. It comes amid new nonconsensual sexual conduct allegations which he denies. NBC’s Ryan Nobles reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Sanders, Warren Drop Endorsements of Maine's Graham Platner
media:content.media:description: Maine’s Democratic senate nominee Graham Platner is facing mounting pressure from top Democrats to end his campaign, including from Elizabeth Warren and Bernie Sanders who have released statements calling for him to step aside. It comes amid new nonconsensual sexual conduct allegations which he denies. NBC’s Ryan Nobles reports for TODAY.

item.title: Sanders, Warren Drop Endorsements of Maine's Graham Platner

item.dc:creator: Ashley Mowreader
Joelle Gross
item.description: New data from job board Indeed finds the number of jobs that have listings with “AI” in the title have tripled from 2022 to 2026, from less than 3% to more than 8%.

media:content.media:text: About 8% of jobs on Indeed include listings that mention AI in the job title.
media:content.media:description: About 8% of jobs on Indeed include listings that mention AI in the job title.

item.title: AI is coming ... for the job listings

item.description: Crews at the former Pfizer headquarters in New York City have been working round-the-clock in an effort to stabilize the building after it was deemed structurally unsafe when some support columns started buckling. Now, video from construction workers 21 floors up shows steel bending inside the high-rise and drone footage appears to capture a slight lean to the building. NBC’s Emilie Ikeda reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Manhattan Building Remains Unstable; Officials Warn of Collapse
media:content.media:description: Crews at the former Pfizer headquarters in New York City have been working round-the-clock in an effort to stabilize the building after it was deemed structurally unsafe when some support columns started buckling. Now, video from construction workers 21 floors up shows steel bending inside the high-rise and drone footage appears to capture a slight lean to the building. NBC’s Emilie Ikeda reports for TODAY.

item.title: Manhattan Building Remains Unstable; Officials Warn of Collapse

item.dc:creator: David Hickey
item.description: Lionel Messi scored another goal — his eighth of the tournament — to help his team to one of the great World Cup comebacks, a 3-2 win over Egypt despite trailing by two with only 11 minutes of regulation time to play.

media:content.media:text: Lionel Messi.
media:content.media:description: Lionel Messi celebrates during the match between Argentina and Egypt at Atlanta Stadium yesterday.

media:content.media:text: Mohamed Salah and teammates.
media:content.media:description: Lionel Messi celebrates during the match between Argentina and Egypt at Atlanta Stadium yesterday.

item.title: From The Sports Desk: Argentina’s great escape

item.description: El DT Campeón del Mundo recconoció no festejar los goles de la "Albiceleste", pero el empate agónico de su capitán ante Egipto lo hizo explotar de júbilo en la banca. Revive cómo vivió el estratega los goles y el final del partido con llanto incluido.

media:content.media:title: La otra hazaña de Messi: logró que Scaloni festejara un gol por primera vez en el Mundial
media:content.media:description: El DT Campeón del Mundo recconoció no festejar los goles de la "Albiceleste", pero el empate agónico de su capitán ante Egipto lo hizo explotar de júbilo en la banca. Revive cómo vivió el estratega los goles y el final del partido con llanto incluido.

item.title: La otra hazaña de Messi: logró que Scaloni festejara un gol por primera vez en el Mundial

item.description: El DT de Suiza y Rubén Vargas destacaron la mentalidad del equipo tras avanzar en penales ante Colombia. Del lado cafetero, Daniel Muñoz, Quintero y Arias lamentaron la eliminación y agradecieron el apoyo de la afición.

media:content.media:title: Suiza hace historia y Colombia se marcha con la frente en alto
media:content.media:description: El DT de Suiza y Rubén Vargas destacaron la mentalidad del equipo tras avanzar en penales ante Colombia. Del lado cafetero, Daniel Muñoz, Quintero y Arias lamentaron la eliminación y agradecieron el apoyo de la afición.

item.title: Suiza hace historia y Colombia se marcha con la frente en alto

item.description: Argentina remontó un 2-0 ante Egipto con Messi como protagonista y avanzó a cuartos de final. Suiza dejó fuera a Colombia en una dramática tanda de penales y quedaron definidos los ocho mejores del Mundial 2026.

media:content.media:title: Radar Mundial: Argentina firma una remontada épica y Suiza elimina a Colombia en penales
media:content.media:description: Argentina remontó un 2-0 ante Egipto con Messi como protagonista y avanzó a cuartos de final. Suiza dejó fuera a Colombia en una dramática tanda de penales y quedaron definidos los ocho mejores del Mundial 2026.

item.title: Radar Mundial: Argentina firma una remontada épica y Suiza elimina a Colombia en penales

item.description: Argentina superó un complicado duelo ante Egipto para instalarse en los cuartos de final de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026. Suiza, por su parte, venció a Colombia en una dramática tanda de penales y también aseguró su lugar entre los ocho mejores.

media:content.media:title: ¡Argentina avanza con autoridad y Suiza sobrevive en los penales!
media:content.media:description: Argentina superó un complicado duelo ante Egipto para instalarse en los cuartos de final de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026. Suiza, por su parte, venció a Colombia en una dramática tanda de penales y también aseguró su lugar entre los ocho mejores.

item.title: ¡Argentina avanza con autoridad y Suiza sobrevive en los penales!

item.description: Dávinson Sánchez y Cucho Hernández no pudieron convertir sus cobros, mientras que Rubén Vargas cerró la tanda con un derechazo que venció a Camilo Vargas para sellar el pase de los europeos a cuartos y dejar a la "Tricolor" fuera de la Copa del Mundo.

media:content.media:title: Amargo adiós: así fue la tanda de penales que despidió a Colombia del Mundial ante Suiza
media:content.media:description: Dávinson Sánchez y Cucho Hernández no pudieron convertir sus cobros, mientras que Rubén Vargas cerró la tanda con un derechazo que venció a Camilo Vargas para sellar el pase de los europeos a cuartos y dejar a la "Tricolor" fuera de la Copa del Mundo.

item.title: Amargo adiós: así fue la tanda de penales que despidió a Colombia del Mundial ante Suiza

item.description: Los expertos destacaron la grandeza de Messi en la remontada argentina ante Egipto y valoraron el esfuerzo de Colombia tras caer en penales ante Suiza. También resaltaron el gran partido egipcio y la entrega de la Tricolor.

media:content.media:title: Messi rescata a Argentina y Colombia se despide con dolor
media:content.media:description: Los expertos destacaron la grandeza de Messi en la remontada argentina ante Egipto y valoraron el esfuerzo de Colombia tras caer en penales ante Suiza. También resaltaron el gran partido egipcio y la entrega de la Tricolor.

item.title: Messi rescata a Argentina y Colombia se despide con dolor

item.description: El extremo del Palmeiras está consciente de la responsabilidad que tenía Colombia en el Mundial y da disculpas a la afición colombiana, prometiendo sobreponerse y mejorar.

media:content.media:title: Jhon Arias: “Como colombianos tenemos la capacidad de sobreponernos a las adversidades”
media:content.media:description: El extremo del Palmeiras está consciente de la responsabilidad que tenía Colombia en el Mundial y da disculpas a la afición colombiana, prometiendo sobreponerse y mejorar.

item.title: Jhon Arias: “Como colombianos tenemos la capacidad de sobreponernos a las adversidades”

item.description: Con un derechazo cruzado que venció a Camilo Vargas en Vancouver, el mediocampista desató la euforia entre los jugadores suizos, quienes estallaron en festejo al sellar su pase a la siguiente fase del Mundial 2026 ante Argentina.

media:content.media:title: Así fue el penal de Rubén Vargas que desató la locura en Suiza y selló el pase cuartos del Mundial
media:content.media:description: Con un derechazo cruzado que venció a Camilo Vargas en Vancouver, el mediocampista desató la euforia entre los jugadores suizos, quienes estallaron en festejo al sellar su pase a la siguiente fase del Mundial 2026 ante Argentina.

item.title: Así fue el penal de Rubén Vargas que desató la locura en Suiza y selló el pase cuartos del Mundial

item.description: Tras el empate en tiempo regular y alargue, la "Tricolor" se despidió de la Copa del Mundo en la tanda de penales en Vancouver, donde Dávinson Sánchez y Cucho Hernández fallaron sus cobros para darle el pase a los europeos ante el Campeón del Mundo.

media:content.media:title: Con el corazón roto: Colombia cae en penales y se despide del Mundial, Suiza va contra Argentina
media:content.media:description: Tras el empate en tiempo regular y alargue, la "Tricolor" se despidió de la Copa del Mundo en la tanda de penales en Vancouver, donde Dávinson Sánchez y Cucho Hernández fallaron sus cobros para darle el pase a los europeos ante el Campeón del Mundo.

item.title: Con el corazón roto: Colombia cae en penales y se despide del Mundial, Suiza va contra Argentina

item.description: Aunque sentía dudas de poder participar en el juego ante Colombia, el delantero Vargas está agradecido de haber jugado y ayudado a mantener al equipo suizo unido durante los 120 minutos, y marcar el último penalti con confianza.

media:content.media:title: Rubén Vargas: “Hoy me sentí más seguro que en todos esos penaltis”
media:content.media:description: Aunque sentía dudas de poder participar en el juego ante Colombia, el delantero Vargas está agradecido de haber jugado y ayudado a mantener al equipo suizo unido durante los 120 minutos, y marcar el último penalti con confianza.

item.title: Rubén Vargas: “Hoy me sentí más seguro que en todos esos penaltis”

item.description: The New Year's Eve ball in Times Square has dropped for America's 250th anniversary, making this the first time the ball has dropped outside of a New Year's celebration.

media:content.media:title: New Year's Eve ball drops in Times Square for America's 250th
media:content.media:description: The New Year's Eve ball in Times Square has dropped for America's 250th anniversary, making this the first time the ball has dropped outside of a New Year's celebration.

item.title: New Year's Eve ball drops in Times Square for America's 250th

item.dc:creator: Scott Wong
Ryan Nobles
item.description: Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear is asking Mitch McConnell for an update on his health and whether he believes he can continue to serve in the role.

media:content.media:text: Sen. Mitch McConnell, R-Ky., at the Capitol on March 24, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Sen. Mitch McConnell, R-Ky., at the Capitol on March 24, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear speaks in Detroit on April 18, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Kentucky Gov. Andy Beshear speaks in Detroit in April.

item.title: Kentucky governor urges McConnell to be ‘transparent’ and give an update on his health

item.dc:creator: David Hickey
item.description: Lionel Messi scored another goal — his eighth of the tournament — to help his team to one of the great World Cup comebacks, a 3-2 win over Egypt despite trailing by two with only 11 minutes of regulation time to play.

media:content.media:text: Lionel Messi.
media:content.media:description: Lionel Messi celebrates during the match between Argentina and Egypt at Atlanta Stadium yesterday.

media:content.media:text: Mohamed Salah and teammates.
media:content.media:description: Lionel Messi celebrates during the match between Argentina and Egypt at Atlanta Stadium yesterday.

item.title: From The Sports Desk: Argentina’s great escape

item.dc:creator: David K. Li
item.description: Veteran journalist Katie Couric revealed that she had a bout of transient global amnesia, a rare but temporary condition that suddenly robs people of nearly all memories even while they maintain self-awareness.

media:content.media:text: Nancy Pelosi In Conversation With Katie Couric
media:content.media:description: Journalist Katie Couric in New York City in 2024.

item.title: Katie Couric reveals diagnosis of temporary amnesia syndrome

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: Four editors tested the Midea U and Windmill WhisperTech window air conditioners for over a year. Here’s what we thought of them based on cooling efficiency and more.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy Harry Rabinowitz; Courtesy Nikki Brown
media:content.media:text: Four NBC Select staff members tested Midea and Windmill’s most popular window AC units, including during record-breaking heat waves in New York City.
media:content.media:description: Four NBC Select staff members tested Midea and Windmill’s most popular window AC units, including during record-breaking heat waves in New York City.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy Harry Rabinowitz; Courtesy Nikki Brown
media:content.media:text: Four NBC Select staff members tested Midea and Windmill’s most popular window AC units, including during record-breaking heat waves in New York City.
media:content.media:description: Four NBC Select staff members tested Midea and Windmill’s most popular window AC units, including during record-breaking heat waves in New York City.

media:content.media:text: A Midea U-Shaped Smart Window Air Conditioner installed.
media:content.media:description: Four NBC Select staff members tested Midea and Windmill’s most popular window AC units, including during record-breaking heat waves in New York City.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy Nikki Brown, NBC Select Editor
media:content.media:text: Windmill’s 8K BTU WhisperTech window AC installed.
media:content.media:description: Four NBC Select staff members tested Midea and Windmill’s most popular window AC units, including during record-breaking heat waves in New York City.

media:content.media:text: A chart comparing Midea’s U-Shaped Smart Window Air Conditioner and The Windmill AC WhisperTech.
media:content.media:description: Four NBC Select staff members tested Midea and Windmill’s most popular window AC units, including during record-breaking heat waves in New York City.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy Nikki Brown, NBC Select Editor
media:content.media:text: A hand holding a knife while cutting Windmill’s window air conditioner panels.
media:content.media:description: Four NBC Select staff members tested Midea and Windmill’s most popular window AC units, including during record-breaking heat waves in New York City.

media:content.media:text: A close-up image of the Midea U-Shaped Smart Window Air Conditioner’s control panel and vents.
media:content.media:description: Four NBC Select staff members tested Midea and Windmill’s most popular window AC units, including during record-breaking heat waves in New York City.

media:content.media:text: A close-up image of The Windmill WhisperTech AC’s control panel, which is built into the top of the unit.
media:content.media:description: Four NBC Select staff members tested Midea and Windmill’s most popular window AC units, including during record-breaking heat waves in New York City.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy Harry Rabinowitz; Courtesy Nikki Brown
media:content.media:text: Midea U-Shaped AC with the front panel removed to show the filter (top), Windmill WhisperTech AC with the front panel removed to show the filter (bottom)
media:content.media:description: Four NBC Select staff members tested Midea and Windmill’s most popular window AC units, including during record-breaking heat waves in New York City.

item.title: Midea vs. Windmill: What’s the better window air conditioner? We tested them to find out

item.dc:creator: Mili Godio
item.description: Hot surfaces and pavement can be extremely dangerous for dogs and their paws. Here’s how to protect their paws from burns, blisters and wounds in the summer heat.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy of Mili Godio; Shalwah Evans
media:content.media:text: During the summer, vets recommend walking your dog early in the morning or later in the evening when the sun is less hot.
media:content.media:description: During the summer, vets recommend walking your dog early in the morning or later in the evening when the sun is less hot.

media:content.media:text: During the summer, vets recommend walking your dog early in the morning or later in the evening when the sun is less hot.
media:content.media:description: During the summer, vets recommend walking your dog early in the morning or later in the evening when the sun is less hot.

media:content.media:text: Small dog wearing boots and a raincoat
media:content.media:description: During the summer, vets recommend walking your dog early in the morning or later in the evening when the sun is less hot.

media:content.media:text: White dog wearing yellow Crocs on pavement
media:content.media:description: During the summer, vets recommend walking your dog early in the morning or later in the evening when the sun is less hot.

item.title: How to keep your dog’s paws safe in the heat, according to vets

item.dc:creator: Lindsay Schneider
Select Staff
item.description: Amazon Prime Day is this week. Here are the 100 most useful purchases our shopping editors have ever bought. We've got skin care, tech, pet essentials and more.

media:content.media:text: Our team of shopping experts compiled our favorite Amazon purchases ever.
media:content.media:description: Our team of shopping experts compiled our favorite Amazon purchases ever.

media:content.media:text: Our team of shopping experts compiled our favorite Amazon purchases ever.
media:content.media:description: Our team of shopping experts compiled our favorite Amazon purchases ever.

item.title: The 100 best things we’ve ever bought from Amazon

item.dc:creator: Harry Rabinowitz
item.description: I’ve tested dozens of fitness trackers from Apple, Garmin, Fitbit and more. Here are my top picks for beginners, runners and anyone on a budget.

media:content.media:text: I’ve tested fitness trackers for years — these are the best ones to help you hit your goals.
media:content.media:description: I’ve tested fitness trackers for years — these are the best ones to help you hit your goals.

media:content.media:text: I’ve tested fitness trackers for years — these are the best ones to help you hit your goals.
media:content.media:description: I’ve tested fitness trackers for years — these are the best ones to help you hit your goals.

media:content.media:text: A close up of the Garmin Vivoactive 6 on the wrist of the writer.
media:content.media:description: I’ve tested fitness trackers for years — these are the best ones to help you hit your goals.

media:content.media:text: A close-up of the FitBit Charge 6, showing the time on the wrist of the writer.

media:content.media:text: A close up of the Amazfit Active 2 sport on the wrist of the writer.

media:content.media:text: A close-up of the Google Fitbit Air on the wrist of the writer.

media:content.media:text: A close up of the Google Pixel Watch 4 on the wrist of the writer.

media:content.media:text: A close-up of the Garmin Forerunner 570 on the wrist of the writer.

media:content.media:text: A close-up of the Whoop MG on the wrist of the writer.
media:content.media:description: I’ve tested fitness trackers for years — these are the best ones to help you hit your goals.

item.title: The best fitness trackers of 2026, tested and reviewed
